name: projx
description: ProjX is a harness-agnostic governed knowledge layer for Codex: scoped recall, enforced gates, verification, and durable learning.

interface.shortDescription: Governed project knowledge for every Codex task.
interface.longDescription: Installs and operates ProjX as a harness-agnostic layer above Codex. ProjX injects scoped knowledge, enforces project gates, verifies work, reconciles stale records, and stages durable learning without requiring manual setup.
